title: CopilotApi
description: Describes all JSON-RPC methods exposed by the Copilot CLI server. SDK codegen tools consume this to produce typed client wrappers.

vision.description: Whether this model supports vision/image input

reasoningEffort.description: Whether this model supports reasoning effort configuration

supports.description: Feature flags indicating what the model supports
supports.title: ModelCapabilitiesSupports

max_context_window_tokens.description: Maximum total context window size in tokens

max_prompt_images.description: Maximum number of images per prompt

limits.description: Token limits for prompts, outputs, and context window
limits.title: ModelCapabilitiesLimits

state.description: Current policy state for this model

terms.description: Usage terms or conditions for this model

multiplier.description: Billing cost multiplier relative to the base rate

supportedReasoningEfforts.description: Supported reasoning effort levels (only present if model supports reasoning effort)

defaultReasoningEffort.description: Default reasoning effort level (only present if model supports reasoning effort)

models.description: List of available models with full metadata

model.description: Optional model ID — when provided, the returned tool list reflects model-specific overrides

namespacedName.description: Optional namespaced name for declarative filtering (e.g., "playwright/navigate" for MCP tools)

description.description: Description of what the tool does

parameters.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input parameters

instructions.description: Optional instructions for how to use this tool effectively

tools.description: List of available built-in tools with metadata

entitlementRequests.description: Number of requests included in the entitlement

usedRequests.description: Number of requests used so far this period

overage.description: Number of overage requests made this period

overageAllowedWithExhaustedQuota.description: Whether pay-per-request usage is allowed when quota is exhausted

quotaSnapshots.description: Quota snapshots keyed by type (e.g., chat, completions, premium_interactions)

tools.description: Tools to include. Defaults to all tools if not specified.
Tools to include. Defaults to all tools if not specified.

servers.description: All MCP servers from user config, keyed by name

name.description: Unique name for the MCP server

tools.description: Tools to include. Defaults to all tools if not specified.
Tools to include. Defaults to all tools if not specified.

name.description: Name of the MCP server to update

tools.description: Tools to include. Defaults to all tools if not specified.
Tools to include. Defaults to all tools if not specified.

name.description: Name of the MCP server to remove

workingDirectory.description: Working directory used as context for discovery (e.g., plugin resolution)

type.description: Server type: local, stdio, http, or sse

enabled.description: Whether the server is enabled (not in the disabled list)

servers.description: MCP servers discovered from all sources

sessionStatePath.description: Path within each session's SessionFs where the runtime stores files for that session

conventions.description: Path conventions used by this filesystem

success.description: Whether the provider was set successfully

sessionId.description: Source session ID to fork from

toEventId.description: Optional event ID boundary. When provided, the fork includes only events before this ID (exclusive). When omitted, all events are included.

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort level to use for the model

supports.description: Feature flags indicating what the model supports
supports.title: ModelCapabilitiesOverrideSupports

max_context_window_tokens.description: Maximum total context window size in tokens

max_prompt_images.description: Maximum number of images per prompt

limits.description: Token limits for prompts, outputs, and context window
limits.title: ModelCapabilitiesOverrideLimits

modelCapabilities.description: Override individual model capabilities resolved by the runtime
modelCapabilities.title: ModelCapabilitiesOverride

modelId.description: Currently active model identifier after the switch

mode.description: The mode to switch to. Valid values: "interactive", "plan", "autopilot".

exists.description: Whether the plan file exists in the workspace

content.description: The content of the plan file, or null if it does not exist

path.description: Absolute file path of the plan file, or null if workspace is not enabled

content.description: The new content for the plan file

files.description: Relative file paths in the workspace files directory

path.description: Relative path within the workspace files directory

content.description: File content as a UTF-8 string

path.description: Relative path within the workspace files directory

content.description: File content to write as a UTF-8 string

prompt.description: Optional user prompt to combine with fleet instructions

started.description: Whether fleet mode was successfully activated

name.description: Unique identifier of the custom agent
Unique identifier of the custom agent

agent.description: Currently selected custom agent, or null if using the default agent

name.description: Name of the custom agent to select
Unique identifier of the custom agent
Unique identifier of the custom agent

description.description: Description of what the skill does

source.description: Source location type (e.g., project, personal, plugin)

userInvocable.description: Whether the skill can be invoked by the user as a slash command

enabled.description: Whether the skill is currently enabled

path.description: Absolute path to the skill file

name.description: Name of the skill to enable
Name of the skill to disable

status.description: Connection status: connected, failed, needs-auth, pending, disabled, or not_configured

source.description: Configuration source: user, workspace, plugin, or builtin

error.description: Error message if the server failed to connect

serverName.description: Name of the MCP server to enable
Name of the MCP server to disable

enabled.description: Whether the plugin is currently enabled

status.description: Current status: running, disabled, failed, or starting

pid.description: Process ID if the extension is running

extensions.description: Discovered extensions and their current status

requestId.description: Request ID of the pending tool call

textResultForLlm.description: Text result to send back to the LLM

error.description: Error message if the tool call failed

result.description: Tool call result (string or expanded result object)

error.description: Error message if the tool call failed

success.description: Whether the tool call result was handled successfully

requestId.description: Request ID from the command invocation event

error.description: Error message if the command handler failed

success.description: Whether the command was handled successfully

message.description: Message describing what information is needed from the user

properties.description: Form field definitions, keyed by field name

requestedSchema.description: JSON Schema describing the form fields to present to the user

action.description: The user's response: accept (submitted), decline (rejected), or cancel (dismissed)

content.description: The form values submitted by the user (present when action is 'accept')

requestId.description: The unique request ID from the elicitation.requested event

action.description: The user's response: accept (submitted), decline (rejected), or cancel (dismissed)

content.description: The form values submitted by the user (present when action is 'accept')

result.description: The elicitation response (accept with form values, decline, or cancel)

success.description: Whether the response was accepted. False if the request was already resolved by another client.

requestId.description: Request ID of the pending permission request

kind.description: Denied because approval rules explicitly blocked it
Denied because no approval rule matched and user confirmation was unavailable
Denied by the user during an interactive prompt

feedback.description: Optional feedback from the user explaining the denial

kind.description: Denied by the organization's content exclusion policy

path.description: File path that triggered the exclusion

message.description: Human-readable explanation of why the path was excluded

kind.description: Denied by a permission request hook registered by an extension or plugin

message.description: Optional message from the hook explaining the denial

interrupt.description: Whether to interrupt the current agent turn

success.description: Whether the permission request was handled successfully

level.description: Log severity level. Determines how the message is displayed in the timeline. Defaults to "info".

ephemeral.description: When true, the message is transient and not persisted to the session event log on disk

url.description: Optional URL the user can open in their browser for more details

eventId.description: The unique identifier of the emitted session event

cwd.description: Working directory (defaults to session working directory)

processId.description: Unique identifier for tracking streamed output

killed.description: Whether the signal was sent successfully

tokensRemoved.description: Number of tokens freed by compaction

messagesRemoved.description: Number of messages removed during compaction

tokenLimit.description: Maximum token count for the model's context window

currentTokens.description: Current total tokens in the context window (system + conversation + tool definitions)

messagesLength.description: Current number of messages in the conversation

conversationTokens.description: Token count from non-system messages (user, assistant, tool)

eventId.description: Event ID to truncate to. This event and all events after it are removed from the session.

eventsRemoved.description: Number of events that were removed

totalPremiumRequestCost.description: Total user-initiated premium request cost across all models (may be fractional due to multipliers)

totalUserRequests.description: Raw count of user-initiated API requests

totalApiDurationMs.description: Total time spent in model API calls (milliseconds)

count.description: Number of API requests made with this model

cost.description: User-initiated premium request cost (with multiplier applied)

requests.description: Request count and cost metrics for this model

cacheReadTokens.description: Total tokens read from prompt cache

cacheWriteTokens.description: Total tokens written to prompt cache

reasoningTokens.description: Total output tokens used for reasoning

usage.description: Token usage metrics for this model

modelMetrics.description: Per-model token and request metrics, keyed by model identifier

lastCallInputTokens.description: Input tokens from the most recent main-agent API call

lastCallOutputTokens.description: Output tokens from the most recent main-agent API call

mode.description: Optional POSIX-style mode for newly created files
Optional POSIX-style mode for newly created files

isFile.description: Whether the path is a file

isDirectory.description: Whether the path is a directory

mode.description: Optional POSIX-style mode for newly created directories

recursive.description: Remove directories and their contents recursively

force.description: Ignore errors if the path does not exist
